Paul Cézanne

5 works in the gallery.

Guillaumin with the Hanged Man
by Paul Cézanne
France · 1873 · Etching on cream laid paper
Montagne Sainte-Victoire (The Arc Valley)
by Paul Cézanne
France · 1880–1890 · Watercolor with graphite
Pistachio Tree at Château Noir
by Paul Cézanne
France · 1895–1905 · Watercolor with graphite on cream wove paper
The Three Skulls
by Paul Cézanne
France · 1902–1906 · Watercolor
Man Wearing a Straw Hat
by Paul Cézanne
France · 1905–1906 · Watercolor with graphite on white wove paper
